sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107048" key="u(peise/leusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεισ-έλευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107048.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">succession</tr_> to an inheritance, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod.Just.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.4.4.20a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
